description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced knowledge of HTML5, particularly semantic elements beyond basic tags like `<div>` and `<span>`. It uses a playful yet challenging tone to engage learners, emphasizing practical application and the importance of modern HTML practices.
Topics: Semantic HTML5 elements, HTML structure and accessibility, Advanced HTML5 features
Audience: Web developers with foundational HTML knowledge seeking to deepen their understanding of HTML5 semantics and best practices.
